expectations.text: Multiple .feature files were created, organized by domain concept
expectations.evidence: 5 files: cluster-erkennung, cluster-visualisierung, cluster-manuell, cluster-persistenz, cluster-layout

expectations.text: Scenarios for automatic cluster detection exist
Scenarios for visual cluster representation exist
Scenarios for saving/loading cluster data exist
Scenarios for manual cluster merge/dissolve exist
Each scenario tests exactly one behavior
All 5 requirement areas have at least one scenario each
